name: Western Union
description_short: Pittsburgh, PA's Western Union at Winners Paradise offers check cashing and money transfer services daily 8AM-9PM.
description_long:
Located at Winners Paradise in Pittsburgh, PA, this Western Union operates daily from 8AM to 9PM with extended hours serving the Pittsburgh area. The standalone location is dedicated to check cashing and money transfer services for residents of Pittsburgh and surrounding communities.

At this Winners Paradise location in Pittsburgh, you can cash checks, send money transfers, and access other Western Union services. Call +1 412-805-7652 to confirm service availability or ask specific questions about your transaction needs.

If you need to cash a check quickly in Pittsburgh or send an urgent money transfer, the Winners Paradise branch offers the extended 8AM-9PM daily hours that many residents appreciate. Bring a valid ID and your check or transfer details when you visit.
address: Winners Paradise, 623 South Ave, Pittsburgh, PA 15221

company_info.headquarters: Winners Paradise, 623 South Ave, Pittsburgh, PA 15221

pros: Extensive physical network with 150+ agent locations visible in Colorado alone, accessible through major retailers like Walmart, Safeway, and City Market
24/7 online initiation of transfers, with flexibility to pay in-store during agent location hours
Multiple service options beyond transfers: money orders, bill payment, mobile top-up, inmate payments, and prepaid card services
Availability in multiple languages (Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese) for diverse customer bases
Some agent locations operate extended hours (Circle K until 11:59 PM) for after-hours cash access
Western Union Rewards program offering potential savings on frequent transactions
Ability to track transfers and update delivery methods online through account portal
cons: Service fees apply to all transactions, making costs higher than traditional bank wire transfers or ACH payments
Exchange rates for international transfers are typically less favorable than bank rates
Service availability limited by agent location hours; most retail partners close by 8:00-10:00 PM, not truly 24/7 for cash pickup
One location (Circle K #0682) offers money orders only, indicating service inconsistency across the network
Website indicates Orange Wallet payment option was temporarily unavailable at time of content capture, suggesting occasional service disruptions
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without access to traditional checking accounts who need reliable cash access
International migrants and families sending remittances to recipients in other countries
Customers needing rapid cash availability and willing to pay premium fees for convenience over bank transfers
Users in areas with limited banking infrastructure who benefit from the extensive retail partner network
diagnosis: Western Union is best suited for unbanked consumers, international remittance senders, and customers prioritizing convenience and speed over cost efficiency. The primary caveat is that all services carry transaction fees significantly higher than traditional banking alternatives, and true 24/7 service is limited to online initiation—cash pickup depends on retail partner hours.
services: Domestic money transfers (send money online or in-store)
meta_description: Western Union at Winners Paradise, Pittsburgh, PA. Check cashing and money transfers open daily 8AM-9PM.
